bugReports.summary: Authentication issue: Login flow works as expected
bugReports.description: During automated validation of "Authentication - Login flow works as expected", the system encountered a blocker that prevented expected user behavior.
stepsToReproduce: Execute scenario: Authentication - Login flow works as expected
Observe behavior and compare with expected journey outcome.
bugReports.expectedResult: User should be able to complete the intended flow without blockers.
